title: WOMEN'S HEALTH AND BIRTH CENTER - 211info
text: MCKENZIE-WILLAMETTE MEDICAL CENTER WOMEN'S HEALTH AND BIRTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care and support for women before, during, and immediately after childbirth or gynecological surgery. Patients delivering at the birth center are connected to a Maternal Care Coordinator who provides support, referrals to prenatal care and community resources, and assistance with creating an individualized birth plan. 1460 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 726-4471 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 726-4400 Main phone Main phone (541) 726-4471 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Delivery/Childbirth Prenatal Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - LACTATION CONSULTATION SERVICES INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MCKENZIE-WILLAMETTE MEDICAL CENTER
